Class MasterAngler

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.skill.ability.MasterAngler
All Implemented Interfaces:
Ability, PassiveAbility
public final class MasterAngler extends Object implements PassiveAbility
Passive perk unlocked at level 30.

Permanently reduces hook wait times by a flat percentage and multiplies all XP earned from fishing.

Reacts to two triggers:

  • FishCastTrigger — contributes the timer reduction to the cast trigger's accumulator.
  • FishCatchTrigger — contributes the XP multiplier to the catch trigger's accumulator.

    • triggerCondition

      public String triggerCondition()
      Description copied from interface: PassiveAbility
      Short player-facing description of when this passive fires, shown in the skill detail GUI. Example: "On casting a fishing rod."
      Specified by:
      triggerCondition in interface PassiveAbility
      Returns:
      a player-facing trigger description

    • accepts

      public boolean accepts(PassiveTrigger trigger)
      Description copied from interface: PassiveAbility
      Returns true if this passive should fire for the given trigger.

      Typically implemented as one or more instanceof checks: 

          return trigger instanceof FishCastTrigger
        || trigger instanceof FishCatchTrigger;

      Specified by:
      accepts in interface PassiveAbility
      Parameters:
      trigger - the trigger token about to be dispatched
      Returns:
      true if this passive handles the trigger

    • onPassiveTrigger

      public void onPassiveTrigger(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid, PassiveTrigger trigger)
      Description copied from interface: PassiveAbility
      Called by AbstractSkill.firePassives(PassiveTrigger, Player, UUID) when this passive's trigger fires and the player's level meets Ability.unlockLevel().

      The trigger token may be cast to the concrete type declared by PassiveAbility.accepts(PassiveTrigger). Passives that aggregate outputs (e.g. timer reductions) write results back into the trigger; the skill reads those results after firePassives returns.

      Specified by:
      onPassiveTrigger in interface PassiveAbility
      Parameters:
      player - the player the trigger concerns
      uuid - the player's UUID
      trigger - the trigger token; cast to the expected concrete type
